---
title: "Coursework"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Welcome to my coursework page for the MS Social Data Science and Research program at the University of Texas, Dallas.

-   [EPPS 6356 Data Visualization | Fall 2025](epps6356.qmd)
-   [EPPS 6323 Knowledge Mining | Spring 2026](epps6323.qmd)
-   [EPPS 6354 Information Management | Spring 2026](6354InfoManagement.qmd)
